core_payload.content:
# Capsule Graph Maintenance Runtime Jobs

## 1. Role
Capsule Graph Maintenance Runtime Jobs owns the executable work lane that makes graph upkeep materially real. It keeps capsule jobs, night-shift execution, vault stewardship coupling, and background runtime support together so maintenance remains bounded work instead of ambient magic.

## 2. Runtime Jobs Surface
This sub-hub groups `capsule-job`, `night-shift-autonomy`, `vault-stewardship-swarm`, and `background-agent-runtime`. Together they define the job envelopes, night posture, stewardship coupling, and runtime substrate that carry graph-maintenance work into actual execution.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own structural repair logic, contradiction debate, or constructive synthesis pressure. Those responsibilities belong to `topology-pressure`, `epistemic-arbitration`, and `synthesis-evolution`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Graph Maintenance Runtime Jobs groups the executable work lane of graph upkeep: Capsule Job, Night Shift Autonomy, Vault Stewardship Swarm, and Background Agent Runtime. It keeps job envelopes, night posture, stewardship coupling, and runtime substrate together so maintenance remains bounded work instead of ambient magic. This boundary matters because graph upkeep only becomes real when there is an explicit lane for jobs, runtime posture, and stewardship execution. It gives maintenance one clear seam for operational delivery.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during Capsule Graph Maintenance decomposition to isolate executable capsule jobs, night-shift posture, stewardship coupling, and runtime support.
